# freeipa_sudo_command (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA Sudo Command.

## Schema

### Required

- `command` (String) The absolute path of the sudo command.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique command identifier.
- `description` (String) Description of the sudo command.
